Class NotebookView

java.lang.Object
javafx.scene.Node
javafx.scene.Parent
javafx.scene.layout.Region
javafx.scene.control.Control
javafx.scene.control.ScrollPane
com.cluegame.gui.NotebookView
All Implemented Interfaces:
javafx.css.Styleable, javafx.event.EventTarget, javafx.scene.control.Skinnable
public class NotebookView extends javafx.scene.control.ScrollPane
Detective notebook panel for manual card tracking. Shows checkboxes for all suspects, weapons and rooms so the player can mark off cards they have seen during the game.
Author:
Thanh Shaw

  • Constructor Details

    • NotebookView

      public NotebookView(List<Player> players)
      Creates the detective notebook panel with checkboxes for all suspects, weapons and rooms.

  • Method Details

    • addSection

      private void addSection(javafx.scene.layout.VBox parent, String sectionName, String[] items)
      Adds a labelled section of checkboxes to the notebook.

    • setCurrentPlayer

      public void setCurrentPlayer(Player player)
      Switches the notebook view to the given player's personal notes. The previous player's checkbox state is saved before the new state loads. AI turns leave the last human notebook visible.
      Parameters:
      player - the player whose notebook should be shown

    • saveCurrentState

      private void saveCurrentState()

    • loadState

      private void loadState(boolean[] state)
